name: UpdateNuspec
description: Sync NuGet dependencies in *.nuspec with PackageReference from matching *.csproj files.
helpMarkDown: Recursively scans `dir` for `.nuspec` files and rewrites `<dependencies>` from the sibling `{id}.csproj`. Requires .NET 8 runtime on the agent. [Documentation](https://github.com/denis-peshkov/update-nuspec-action)
author: Denis Peshkov

inputs.name: dir
inputs.label: Scan directory
inputs.helpMarkDown: Root folder to scan recursively. Defaults to `$(Build.SourcesDirectory)` when empty.

inputs.name: dryRun
inputs.label: Dry run
inputs.helpMarkDown: Print the report without modifying `.nuspec` files.
